ground_truth.title: Cloud Computing recent news
ground_truth.main_content: This is the Cloud Computing topic page on InformationWeek, featuring the latest news and expert commentary on cloud computing technologies. Recent articles cover topics including Lumen's CTO Dave Ward discussing the emergence of 'Cloud 2.0', Florida Crystals CIO on building tech transformation, CIO primer on federal policy and data center sustainability, and insights on AI power consumption and sustainability. The page aggregates news about cloud infrastructure, multi-cloud strategies, hybrid cloud deployments, and cloud governance from various industry experts and technology leaders.
with: Lumen's CTO on the emergence of 'Cloud 2.0'
Offering more AI tools can't guarantee better adoption -- so what can?
Outsmart risk: A 5-point plan to survive a data breach
It's time to revamp IT security to deal with AI
Make your own mandate: How CISOs can implement GenAI governance
